plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for Harmonic NSG Pro and access-platform devices under enterprise PEN 1563. The current MIB facts confirm the private enterprise root and access platform identity, but no stable row-filter-free scalar CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply OID was confirmed. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Access SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models — Harmonic NSG Pro and compatible IF-MIB access devices.
name: Access
